headline: How Haven Safety AI Could Shape AES Growth And Risk Profile
summary: Haven Safety AI, co founded by AES, has been selected as one of three finalists for the 2026 Edison Award for innovation in the electric power industry. The Edison Electric Institute is recognizing Haven Safety AI for its work applying artificial intelligence to improve safety and efficiency in power operations. For investors watching NYSE:AES, this recognition points to how the company is involved in applying AI to core electric power operations, including safety and reliability. Within...
